5.11.57.en: v5.11.56: Fixed vibration sensor triggers for alarm_vibration, temperature, and flow (Forum #1559/#1561)., Added remote_dimmer driver for Lidl HG06323 TS1001 with full IR remote support., Implemented GitHub Deep Search engine to search over 20 Zigbee projects for fingerprints, data points, and converters., Reset Gmail token health with a new refresh token set for 2026-03-02., Updated auto-publishi

5.11.67.en: v5.11.66: Added IMAP fallback for Gmail diagnostics (permanent, no 7-day expiry)., Updated diagnostics scripts for better functionality., Auto-published with 145 drivers and 3093 fingerprints., Updated diagnostics summary and workflow files.
